product_information.product_name: Aquafresh White Renew Long Lasting Whitening Tandpasta 75 ML

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, Pentasodium Triphosphate, PEG-6, Alumina, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, PVP, Xanthan Gum, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Menthol, Carrageenan, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Sodium Hydroxide, Mentha Piperita Oil, Anethole, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Carvone, Limonene, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, CI 73360, CI 74160, CI 74260. Bevat natriumfluoride (1450 ppm F⁻)
inferred_information.legal_grade:
Up to 3x more effective stain removal with advanced stain block to help prevent stains,Aquafresh White Renew Long Lasting Whitening is a combination of clinically proven whitening ingredients which reverses stains and helps to protect your teeth's natural whiteness.,1 LIFTS DEEP STAINS from the tooth surface
2 GENTLY POLISHES TEETH for a shiny appearance
3 PREVENTS NEW STAINS to help keep teeth white
